title:
Financial cash flow for Small Businesses 
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Financial cash flow for Small Businesses
I'm working on a project report titled "Optimizing Financial Reporting and Cash Flow Management for Small Businesses Using Xero." To build the report, I need some data as a foundation. If possible, could you please provide it in Excel, Word, or PDF format? I'd really appreciate your help!
gathering data from the actual small business units which would also be not reliable.

### Response from Ministry for Primary Industries
Status Different agency responsible
Comments Kia ora,

This data is not held by MPI. There is data available from Statistics NZ such as the Business operations survey https://www.stats.govt.nz/information-releases/business-operations-survey-2023/

You could try to request this data from Statistics NZ or the Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment. They are most likely to hold this data.

Thank you

#### Likely Source Agency
Ministry for Primary Industries
